DENY AS TO PLAINTIFF (POLYAK). TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT (1)WHETHER 1997 NOTE SUPERSEDES PRIOR NOTES; (2)WHETHER 1997 NOTE WAS PROCURED BY DURESS/MENACE; (3)WHETHER DEFENDANTS ARE OBLIGATED UNDER INITIAL PROMISSORY NOTES AND THEREFORE, WHETHER 6/1/97 NOTE WAS SUPPORTED BY ADEQUATE CONSIDERATION. DENY AS TO PLAINTIFF (ROZENGURT). TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT RE WHETHER DEFENDANTS ARE OBLIGATED UNDER INITIAL PROMISSORY NOTES AND WHETHER 6/1/97 NOTE WAS SUPPORTED BY ADEQUATE CONSIDERATION. COURT DOES NOT RULE ON DEFENDANTS DEFENSES OR ISSUES OF DUTY BECAUSE THE NOTICE OF MOTION FAILS TO RAISE THOSE MATTERS. (302/AJR/PB)
